CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value INT);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, score INT);
SELECT MIN(t.value) FROM test_table t JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.ref_id;
SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_table WHERE value > 5;
SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT MIN(subquery.value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT MIN(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value < 15) AS filtered_values;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id INT, category VARCHAR(10));
SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM complex_table WHERE category = 'A');
SELECT MIN(COALESCE(value, 100)) FROM test_table WHERE value < 100;
